2606.11953.title: Decoding Multimodal Cues: Unveiling the Implicit Meaning Behind Hateful Videos
2606.11953.paper_summary: Hateful videos have become prevalent on online platforms, highlighting an urgent need for effective detection. However, existing studies primarily focus on binary classification and fail to provide contextual rationales that reveal the implicit meanings behind these judgments, significantly undermining model explainability. To fill this gap, we aim to achieve explainable hateful video detection, enabling models to provide contextual rationales that integrate relevant evidence and logical reasoning alongside decisions. This approach can comprehensively enhance the understanding of video content and the explainability of the decision-making process. We first introduce two datasets, Ex-HateMM and Ex-ImpliHateVid, for explainable hateful video detection. Each dataset provides fine-grained annotations of multimodal harmful elements, along with contextual rationales. We then propose an Information Augmentation and Reasoning Enhancement (IARE) framework designed for explainable detection. The framework employs an information augmentation phase that leverages the multimodal chain-of-thought to integrate harmful elements, thereby enriching rationale evidence. Additionally, IARE incorporates a reasoning enhancement phase, in which Direct Preference Optimization guides the model toward correct reasoning paths and away from incorrect ones, thereby improving the logical coherence of its justifications. We conduct extensive experiments on the two datasets, comparing multiple baselines with our proposed IARE framework. The results demonstrate that IARE achieves state-of-the-art performance while also generating accurate rationales.
2606.11953.paper_summary_zh: 仇恨視頻在網上平台上變得普遍，突顯了有效檢測的迫切需求。<lb/>然而，現有研究主要集中在二元分類上，未能提供揭示這些判斷背後隱含意義的上下文理由，顯著削弱了模型的可解釋性。<lb/>為了填補這一空白，我們旨在實現可解釋的仇恨視頻檢測，使模型能夠提供整合相關證據和邏輯推理的上下文理由，與決策並行。<lb/>這種方法可以全面增強對視頻內容的理解以及決策過程的可解釋性。<lb/>我們首先介紹兩個數據集，Ex-HateMM 和 Ex-ImpliHateVid，用於可解釋的仇恨視頻檢測。<lb/>每個數據集提供了多模態有害元素的細粒度註釋，以及上下文理由。<lb/>然後，我們提出了一個信息增強和推理增強（IARE）框架，旨在進行可解釋的檢測。<lb/>該框架採用信息增強階段，利用多模態思維鏈來整合有害元素，從而豐富理由證據。<lb/>此外，IARE 還包含一個推理增強階段，其中直接偏好優化引導模型朝向正確的推理路徑，遠離錯誤的推理路徑，從而提高其論證的邏輯一致性。<lb/>我們在這兩個數據集上進行了廣泛的實驗，將多個基準與我們提出的 IARE 框架進行比較。<lb/>結果表明，IARE 實現了最先進的性能，同時生成了準確的理由。
2606.11953.author: Junyu Lu et.al.
2606.11953.authors: Junyu Lu, Deyi Ji, Liqun Liu, Xiaokun Zhang, Youlin Wu, Roy Ka-Wei Lee, Peng Shu, Huan Yu, Jie Jiang, Bo Xu, Liang Yang, Hongfei Lin
